Engage

Pursuit Pro1 6.0 Widebody

ControlWidebodyUSAP approved2025Beginner

2025 widebody control paddle from Engage, with a 15mm core, a soft, dense feel and high spin.

$260

Street price as of July 2026 — retailers move it.

Search Amazon — Engage Pursuit Pro1 6.0 Widebody (opens in new tab)

This is an affiliate link — we may earn a commission if you buy, at no extra cost to you. It never changes which paddles appear here or how they're described. As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases. How this works.

Measured performance.

Where this paddle sits against the 514 we track. We describe the band it lands in rather than publishing the underlying lab figures — those are licensed, and the bands are the part we can share.

SpinHighLower range

How much bite the face puts on the ball.

PowerLowBottom fifth

Ball speed off the face on a full swing.

ControlVery highTop fifth of the catalog

Touch and placement — the trade-off against raw power.

ForgivenessVery highTop fifth of the catalog

How stable the head stays on an off-centre hit.

Hand speedHighUpper range

How quickly it moves in a hands battle at the kitchen.

Full specifications

BrandEngage
Released2025
Tournament approvalUSAP
ShapeWidebody
Impact feelSoft/Dense
Core thickness15 mm
Static weight8.06 oz
Balance point240 mm
Grip length5 in
Grip circumference4.25 in
Spin ratingHigh
Best forBeginner

Where to go from here.

Same play style, a different trade-off — one steps up the measured performance, one protects your wallet.

Top pick

Prokennex Black Ace 16

$279 +$19 vs this

The step up in this play style: more power · more spin · quicker through the air. Same widebody shape, 16mm core.
